title: ParticlePack
description: ParticlePack — a Minecraft Java Edition modpack inspired by Actions & Stuff. It adds a variety of visual effects and enhanced particles for in-game actions, making the world more dynamic and alive.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00e9e383c147406f450cecb538690957ea1959ec.png)

## Description
**ParticlePack is a Minecraft Java Edition modpack inspired by Actions & Stuff. It focuses on visual enhancement, adding detailed and spectacular particles for all core in-game actions: attacks, mining blocks, movement, interacting with the environment, and more. Every in-game event becomes more responsive, vibrant, and cinematic, elevating the visual experience to a new level without altering the core gameplay.**

## 📋 System Requirements
**Minimum:**
*   RAM: 4 GB
  *   GPU: GTX 1050

**Recommended:**
*   RAM: 8 GB or more
*   GPU: GTX 1650 Or Higher

## ⬇️ Installation


<details>
<summary>Modrinth App</summary>

Open the Launcher


Search for modpack (ParticlePack)


Click download Run and play
</details>

<details>
<summary>MultiMC/ Prism Launcher</summary>

Click in the launcher "Add build"

  
Select "Modrinth" and search this modpack (ParticlePack)


Click download


Run and play
</details>





**Important:** Allocate at least 4-6 GB of RAM in your launcher settings for stable performance.
